text:
Ruler's Blessing (支配者の祝福) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game. This is the rarest, hardest and last card a player needs to collect.
__NOTOC__

Summary

Ruler's Blessing 支配者の祝福 - This card contains a castle awarded to the game player who got the highest ranking score in the end-game quiz. It comes with the capital city Limeiro, and 10,000 residents. Each one will obey any commands or laws you give.

This is card number #000 from the game's designated slots. As such, this card is required by any player in order to complete the game. This card is presented to the player by a Game Master at the capital city of Limeiro. This card is only available to a single game player and can only be earned by using the card Ruler's Invitation, awarded by winning the 'end of game' quiz. The quiz only becomes available when a player has collected cards #001 to #099. As such, this card is the last one a player needs to collect.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; width: 100%; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.000 :: 支配者の祝福 
クイズ優勝のほうびとして城が与えられる。人口１万人の城下町のおまけ付き。この町の人々はあなたの作る法律や指令に従い生活する。
|-
![Eng]
|No.000 :: Ruler's Blessing 
Castle is given as a reward for winning quiz. Bonus is a city with 10,000 population. People of this town live in accordance to directives and rules you set.
|}

Trivia

Gon is the first player to clear the game and be presented with this card.
Dwun and List present this card to the player.
